core_mechanism: mapping the constrained dynamics of degrees of freedom on a closed curved manifold onto charged particles moving in an effective (Berry/gauge) monopole field, whose flux is topologically fixed by a Dirac-type integer quantization condition
brief_reason: The abstract states the vortex dynamics on a spherical shell is formally equivalent to charged particles on a sphere in a magnetic-monopole field, with the monopole charge automatically satisfying Dirac's quantization condition.
